default_use_mode.summary: Use this skill proactively for Git traceability in Octopus_OS and Otctopus_OS_AgentConsole; AI traceable record remotes are default, while human-controlled remotes require explicit user request.

must_use_sequence: Read the runtime contract through the CLI JSON entry before deep references.
Treat SKILL.md as a facade and route deeper only after the contract is known.
When Git traceability is needed in Octopus_OS or Otctopus_OS_AgentConsole, use this skill proactively instead of waiting for a manual Git instruction.
Keep AI traceable record remotes as the default write target and require explicit human request before using human-controlled remotes.
